title: A chain extender and a process for preparing a self-healing polyurethane and polyurethane thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to a chain extender for preparing a self-healing polyurethane, comprising double bond group, hydroxyl group, and carboxyl group as shown in structure (I) or derivatives thereof.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A chain extender for preparing a self-healing polyurethane, comprising double bond group, hydroxyl group, and carboxyl group as shown in structure (I) or derivatives thereof: . 2. The chain extender according to claim 1, wherein the chain extender has structure as shown in structure (II): wherein, R1 and R2 represents independent group selected from hydrogen, halogen, alkyl, alkyl halide, alkoxy, ether, amine, alternatively are alkenyl, alkynyl, phenyl, benzyl, or cyclic hydrocarbon comprising hetero atom; and n is integer from 1 to 30. 3. The chain extender according to claim 2, wherein n is from 2 to 15. 4. The chain extender according to claim 2, wherein R1 and R2 is alkyl group. 5. The chain extender according to claim 4, wherein R1 and R2 can be selected from octyl, -(CH 2 )8-) or (hexyl, -(CH 2 )6-). 6. A process for preparing the self-healing polyurethane, comprising: a) preparing of polyurethane by reaction between isocyanate and polyol at the temperature from 50 to 100 Â°C; and b) adding of the chain extender comprising double bond group, hydroxyl group, and carboxyl group as shown in structure (I) or derivative thereof into mixture in a) and subjecting the obtained mixture to reaction at the temperature of 50 - 100 Â°C: 7. The process for preparing polyurethane according to claim 6, wherein the chain extender has structure as shown in structure (II): wherein, R1 and R2 represents independent group selected from hydrogen, halogen, alkyl, alkyl halide, alkoxy, ether, amine, alternatively are alkenyl, alkynyl, phenyl, benzyl, or cyclic hydrocarbon comprising hetero atom; and n is integer from 1 to 30. 8. The process for preparing polyurethane according to claim 7, wherein n is from 2 to 15. 9. The process for preparing polyurethane according to claim 7, wherein R1 and R2 is alkyl group. 10. The process for preparing polyurethane according to claim 7, wherein R1 and R2 can be selected from octyl, -(CHbjs-) or (hexyl, -(ClTjs-)- 11. The process for preparing polyurethane according to claim 6, wherein isocyanate and polyol in a) has mole ratio of isocyanate to polyol from 0.1 to 1. 12. The process for preparing polyurethane according to claim 6 or 7, wherein the chain extender in b) has mole ratio of hydroxyl group in the chain extender to isocyanate in from 0.1 to 1. 13. The process for preparing polyurethane according to claim 6, wherein polyol is selected from polyether polyol, polyester polyol, polyester-ether polyol, polyethylene glycol, polycarprolactone, polycarbonate, or a mixture thereof. 14. The process according to claim 6, wherein isocyanate is selected from isophorone diisocyanate (IPDI), hexamethylene diisocyanate (HDI), 4,4'-methylenebis(phenyl isocyanate) 

 (MDI), 4,4â-methylene dicyclohexyl diisocyanate (HMDI), toluene diisocyanate (TDI), or a mixture thereof. 15. The process according to claim 6, wherein the mixture in step b) further comprising the aprotic solvent selected from dimethyl sulfoxide, dimethylformamide, tetrahydrofuran, or dimethylacetamide, or a mixture thereof. 16. The self-healing polyurethane comprising pre-polyurethane obtained from isocyanate and polyol and the chain extender comprising double bond group, hydroxyl group, and carboxyl group as shown in structure (I) or derivatives thereof: 17. The polyurethane according to claim 16, wherein the chain extender has structure as shown in structure (II): wherein, R1 and R2 represents independent group selected from hydrogen, halogen, alkyl, alkyl halide, alkoxy, ether, amine, alternatively are alkenyl, alkynyl, phenyl, benzyl, or cyclic hydrocarbon comprising hetero atom; and n is integer from 1 to 30. 18. The polyurethane according to claim 16, wherein n is from 2 to 15. 19. The polyurethane according to claim 16, wherein R1 and R2 is alkyl group. 20. The polyurethane according to claim 16, wherein R1 and R2 can be selected from octyl, -(CH 2 )S-) or (hexyl, -(Ct le-). 21. The polyurethane according to claim 16, wherein polyol is selected from polyether polyol, polyester polyol, polyester-ether polyol, polyethylene glycol, polycarprolactone, polycarbonate, or a mixture thereof. 22. The polyurethane according to claim 16, wherein, wherein isocyanate is selected from isophorone diisocyanate (IPDI), hexamethylene diisocyanate (HDI), 4,4'-methylenebis(phenyl isocyanate) (MDI), 4,4â-methylene dicyclohexyl diisocyanate (HMDI), toluene diisocyanate (TDI), or a mixture thereof.
